# SL-SCHEMA-004: product-schema-missing-offers

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

Product schema is missing offers where route policy requires offers.

## Metadata

- Category: Schema.org (schema-org)
- Default severity: warning
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: page
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- raw-html
- rendered-dom

## Required Evidence

- schema-fragment
- route-contract

## When This Triggers

Inspect Product JSON-LD nodes for offers when policy requires sellable product
data.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Add offers to Product schema or update route policy.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/schema/product-missing-offers

Fixed direction:

- Add offers to Product schema or update route policy.
